heading: Restrictions
label: 40305 Restrictions
text: The corporation may not engage in business for profit or issue stock.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)4030536:204., .July 1, 1946, ch. 527, § 460 Stat. 347This section is substituted for 36:204(a) to eliminate unnecessary words. The text of 36:204(b) is omitted as executed and obsolete.
